stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
You are about to depart for a commercial flight from Africa to Europe, with an aircraft having a capacity of more than 250 passenger seats. As part of your pre-flight calculations, you need to compute the Traffic Load in accordance with standard passenger (use ALL adult) and baggage masses as defined in the annex. What is the traffic load, given the following information?

Flight crew: 2 
Male passengers: 170 
Female passengers: 158 
Children: 16 
Infants: 8 seated on their parents laps 
Baggage: 233 pieces 
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
